overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through a rain-soaked futuristic city at dusk. The player travels from an open highway into a long underground tunnel, then emerges into a vibrant neon-lit downtown district with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

events.description: approaching and entering tunnel entrance from open highway

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed on rain-slicked highway toward tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: distant car visible ahead on highway, moving same direction

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the highway
yellow and black striped concrete barrier along right side
modern curved street lamps illuminating the highway
futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon against dark clouds
large concrete tunnel portal with overhead signage gantry

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet coastal highway at dusk, with palm trees swaying alongside the road. The motorcycle speeds toward a tunnel entrance, passing modern street lights while distant skyscrapers pierce the overcast sky. The road glistens with recent rain as the player approaches the dark tunnel mouth.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane underground tunnel with illuminated walls and digital advertisements

events.description: entering tunnel causes dramatic shift from natural dusk to fluorescent artificial lighting
executing sharp right turn while navigating through tunnel
passing through tunnel section with red illuminated walls and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: navigating through underground tunnel at high speed, executing a sharp turn and passing illuminated advertisement displays

entered.detail: long strips of bright white fluorescent tubes along tunnel ceiling
smooth grey concrete tunnel walls with reflective surfaces
illuminated advertisement screen showing commercial content on tunnel wall
green illuminated exit sign and emergency door
section of tunnel walls painted red with ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters the tunnel, transitioning from natural to harsh fluorescent lighting. The rider navigates a sharp right turn through the enclosed concrete corridor, passing sections with red illuminated walls and digital billboards. The tunnel stretches ahead with reflective wet asphalt and rhythmic overhead lights until the exit portal becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with holographic advertisements and elevated highway structures

events.description: exiting tunnel into vibrant neon-lit city center with towering skyscrapers
navigating through intersection with yellow crosswalk markings
entering section with prominent pink and purple neon lighting under elevated highway ramps

agents.ego_description: weaving through city traffic, passing other vehicles and navigating intersections in the neon-soaked downtown district

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in parallel lane, overtaken by motorcycle

entered.detail: bright neon signage in Japanese and English characters covering building facades
towering futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows
multi-level highway ramps and overpasses with integrated lighting
large floating holographic display projecting commercial imagery
massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene explodes into a canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers. The motorcycle weaves through the rain-slicked streets, passing under elevated highways and alongside holographic advertisements. Pink and purple neon lights reflect off the wet asphalt as the rider navigates through intersections, surrounded by the towering glass architecture of Night City's downtown district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey from a moody coastal highway through a subterranean corridor and into a vibrant, neon-drenched metropolis. It begins on a rain-slicked road at dusk, speeding past swaying palm trees and distant skyscrapers toward the dark mouth of a tunnel. As the motorcycle enters the tunnel, the natural light shifts to harsh fluorescent glows and red illuminated walls, with the camera navigating a sharp right turn through the enclosed concrete space. The scene then opens as the rider emerges from the tunnel into a canyon of towering glass architecture, where the lighting explodes into a palette of pink and purple neon. Finally, the camera weaves through rain-soaked intersections and under elevated highways, surrounded by holographic advertisements and the glowing skyline of the downtown district.
